entries.text:
Verses 1-89

The Offerings of the Princes at the Dedication of the Altar

The twelve princes, each representing his tribe, presented gold and silver vessels for use in sacrifices, sacrificial animals, and wagons and oxen for the transport of the tabernacle: see Numbers 4:29-49; The dedication of these offerings occupied twelve days, and was a service of thanksgiving.

13. Charger] a large dish, as in Matthew 14:8.

89. To speak with him] i.e. with Jehovah.
